subject: [PATCH v2 12/18] gfs2: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the GFS2 file system's iomap operations to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a helper function that finishes previous mappings and produces the next one. This change does not introduce any functional changes, it only updates the interface used by the file system. The conversion uses the iomap_process() helper function to manage the mapping process.
